    Method
    Description
    Category
    Category.createCategory(store.Store store, String name)
    It allows a manager to add categories to the store
    Category[]
    StoreProduct.getCategories()
    It returns the product's categories
    Methods in product with parameters of type Category
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    StoreProduct.addCategory(Category... newCategories)
    It allows the system or an employee to add categories to a product
    void
    StoreProduct.removeCategory(Category... categories)
    It allows an employee to remove categories from a product
